channel.title: Monitoring on DevOpsTales
channel.description: Recent content in Monitoring on DevOpsTales

item.title: How to Backup and Restore Prometheus
item.description: Backing up Prometheus is critical for preserving your monitoring history and metrics data. This updated guide for 2026 covers modern backup strategies using the Prometheus Admin API, Velero, and volume snapshots in Kubernetes environments with prometheus-operator.
